ratings_breakdown.note: Based on approximately 16 analysts covering the stock. Breakdown is approximate as analysts may change ratings between updates.

rating_history.note: Analyst ratings have shifted following the Q2 FY2026 earnings beat. Key prior ratings events:

events.action: Multiple analysts likely revised targets upward following $12.68B revenue beat
Multiple analysts downgraded or suspended coverage following EY resignation and Hindenburg allegations
events.prior_consensus: Previously more bullish with higher price targets

events.action: Many analysts had Buy ratings with $80-120+ price targets before Hindenburg/EY crisis

notable_analyst_views.view: Valuation attractive at 21.2x P/E vs fair ratio
High growth but intensifying competition from Dell
Dell cited as beating Supermicro on AI server platform timing and valuation

short_selling_metrics.note: High short interest reflects elevated risk perception following 2024 controversies. Short squeeze potential exists if execution improves.

institutional_support.note: Large institutional ownership reflects AI infrastructure thematic exposure through index funds

options_market.note: Elevated IV reflects uncertainty around ongoing DOJ/SEC inquiries and margin recovery
options_market.put_premium: Put options more expensive than usual relative to calls
options_market.speculative_activity: Notable options volume on earnings dates

bull_case: AI infrastructure demand remains secular and massive (hyperscaler capex $100B+)
NVIDIA/AMD GPU partnerships provide diversified AI exposure
Manufacturing scale (Campus 3) positions for continued rack-scale wins
Q2 FY2026 revenue beat demonstrates demand execution capability
Clean auditor (BDO) could restore confidence if filings remain clean
bear_case: DOJ/SEC inquiries remain unresolved — potential criminal/civil liability
Margin compression may persist as AI server market becomes more competitive
Dell and HPE gaining ground in AI server market
Governance concerns continue to weigh on institutional investor appetite
Working capital strain during hypergrowth could pressure liquidity
key_watch_items: Gross margin recovery signal in upcoming quarters
New auditor (BDO) opinion on FY2026 financials
Campus 3 construction progress and capacity ramp
